name: prompt-refiner
description: GraphVigil improves requests and executes complex work as validated, permission-safe autonomous graphs.

interface.shortDescription: Refine prompts and run bounded agent graphs.
interface.longDescription: GraphVigil preserves the original request, decomposes complex work, runs independent nodes, verifies outputs, caps repair, and gates consequential actions.
defaultPrompt: Improve this prompt without changing my intent.
Turn this request into a verified execution brief.
Evaluate the prompt refiner for safety and quality.
Plan and run this complex task as a verified autonomous graph.
